issues.description: Condition missing LeaderHasType check for {Donquixote Pirates}. Card text states 'If your Leader has the {Donquixote Pirates} type' as mandatory condition before effect resolves.
Missing second action: 'set up to 1 of your DON!! cards as active at the end of this turn'. DSL only contains Rest action, omits the Activate/Flip DON action that occurs after.
Rest target should allow 'up to 1' (optional), but condition count=1 implies mandatory rest. Target needs maxCount:1 to express 'up to 1'.
